attributes.description: Whether the menu should automatically close after an action is selected.

The HTML button type (ignored when used as a link).

The URL that the hyperlink points to.

events.name: show-collapsible

events.name: shown-collapsible
events.description: Emitted when collapsible content has been made visible (after CSS transitions).

attributes.name: initialDate
attributes.description:
Sets the initial date in the format `YYYY-MM-DD`.
Example: `2024-10-02`.

attributes.name: hasCheckbox
attributes.description: Enables the checkbox next to the date picker.

attributes.name: isCheckboxChecked
attributes.description: Sets the initial state of the checkbox.

attributes.name: checkboxTitle
attributes.description: Title for the checkbox.

attributes.name: dateBlackList
attributes.description:
An array of dates that should be grayed out.
Can either be an array of dates or an array of objects containing a "from" and "to" date and an optional title.
Example: `[new Date(2024, 9, 15)]` or `[{from: "01.02.2025", to: "10.02.2025", title: "Beispieltermin"}]`.

attributes.name: watchForExternalUpdates
attributes.description: Watch for external updates.

attributes.name: zeitraum
attributes.description:
Sets the start and end dates for the range.
Example: `{ beginn: new Date(), ende: new Date() }`.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the date picker when true.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text for the input field.

attributes.name: range
attributes.description: Enables range selection mode.

attributes.name: inputAttr
attributes.description: Additional attributes for the input element.

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Allows the date picker to be cleared when set to true.

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Enables manual input in the date field when set to true.

events.name: pick-element
events.description: Emitted when a date is selected.

events.description: Emitted when the selected date value changes.

events.name: is-checkbox-checked
events.description: Emitted when the checkbox state changes.

events.name: date-picker-opened
events.description: Emitted when the date picker is opened.

events.name: update-range
events.description: Emitted when the date range is updated.

events.name: update-termindauer
events.description: Emitted when the duration is updated.

events.name: start-end
events.description: Emitted when the start or end dates are changed.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: The unique identifier for the input (optional).

attributes.name: modelValue
attributes.description:
ModelValue of the input.
With inputs of type file, normally this is uni-directional.
However, you can clear the file input's selected files by setting the modelValue to either null
(for single mode) or an empty array [] (for multiple mode).

attributes.name: accept
attributes.description:
Which file formats to accept.
Can be either file extension or mime-type or mixed
e.g. '.pdf', 'application/pdf' or '.pdf, application/pdf'

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allows selecting multiple files at once.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the component.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description:
Title for the search button.
Defaults to "Datei auswählen" if no title is set.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Changes the state to error.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Required attribute of the input.

events.name: update:modelValue

attributes.description: Clear the search input after `select()`. Use only when multiple is true.

attributes.name: openDirection
attributes.description: Fixed opening direction (instead of auto). Options are "above"/"top" or "below"/"bottom"

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Equivalent to the placeholder attribute on a `<select>` input.

attributes.name: preselectFirst
attributes.description: Selects the first option if initial value is empty

attributes.description: If set to true, will preserve the search query when opening/closing the component.

attributes.name: ariaLabel

attributes.description: ID of an element that labels the input element.

attributes.name: ariaDescribedby
attributes.description: ID of an element that describes the input element.

attributes.description: Size of the toggle switch. Can be 'sm' for small, 'md' for medium, or undefined for default.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Icon to be displayed in the button.

attributes.name: danger
attributes.description: Applies the 'danger' styles to the button.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Show a loading spinner.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description:
The HTML button type attribute. If undefined
the type defaults to 'button'.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description:
The URL that the hyperlink points to.
If href is set an anchor
element is rendered instead of a button.

events.name: click
events.description: Emitted when the button gets clicked.

attributes.name: collapsed
attributes.description:
Whether there should be no gap between the
elements.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: The URL that the hyperlink points to.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description:
Icon to be displayed in front of the link text.
Can be set to 'false' when using external links to
hide the icon.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description:
The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated
link types. "noopener noreferrer" gets set automatically
when "external" is true.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description:
Where to display the linked URL,
as the name for a browsing context.
Gets set to "_blank" automatically when "external" is true.

attributes.name: external
attributes.description: Whether the link is an external link.

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: How to format the link (telephone or email formatting).

attributes.name: darker
attributes.description: Whether the link should be a slightly darker blue.

events.name: click
events.description: Emitted when the link is clicked.

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Adds a border around the list group.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specifies the HTML tag to use for the root element of the component.

attributes.name: collapseId
attributes.description:
The unique identifier for the collapsible element. This identifier is used to associate the
collapsible content with its corresponding trigger for accessibility and Bootstrap's collapse functionality.

attributes.name: tag
attributes.description: Specifies the HTML tag to use for the root element.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: The URL that the hyperlink points to.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description:
Indicates whether the collapsible row content is initially expanded.
When set to true, the collapsible content will be visible by default.

events.name: show
events.description: This event is fired immediately when the show method has been called.

events.name: hide
events.description: This event is fired immediately when the hide method has been called.

attributes.name: ariaLabel
attributes.description: Aria label for the spinner.

attributes.name: expirationTime
attributes.description: Defines when the current session expires (UNIX timestamp in seconds)

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description: Defines how many minutes before the logout the alert should be visible

events.name: click
events.description: Emitted when the user clicks the "Neu anmelden" button

attributes.name: numberOfElements
attributes.description: Total Number of Elements

attributes.name: ariaLabel
attributes.description: Label of pagination menu for accessibilty ("aria-label")

attributes.name: ariaContentId
attributes.description: ID of the HTML element the pagination is controlling for accessibility ("aria-controls")

attributes.name: elementsPerPageOptions
attributes.description: Configure select options for "elements per page"

attributes.name: numberOfPageNumbers
attributes.description: Configure maximum number of page buttons in pagination

attributes.name: numberOfPagesAsProp
attributes.description: Set number of pages as prop if the calculation should not be handled automatically (e.g. for serverside pagination). A note for migration: Was "pagesFromServer"

attributes.name: currentPageAsProp
attributes.description: Set current page as prop (e.g. for serverside pagination)

attributes.name: elementsPerPageAsProp
attributes.description: Set default option for "elements per page". If not set the first option will be selected. This is useful e.g. when resetting the page size to default on removing filters.

events.name: updatePagination
events.description: Emitted when the pagination is updated

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique ID of the select (optional).

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Array of options to be displayed.

attributes.name: modelValue
attributes.description: ModelValue of the select.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Title attribute of the select.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the select.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emitted when the selected value changes.

attributes.name: fields
attributes.description: An array of field definition objects, each defining the properties of a table column.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description:
An array of data objects to be displayed in the table rows.
Each object should match the structure defined by the `fields` array.

attributes.name: hideHeader
attributes.description:
Whether to hide the table header while keeping it accessible for screen readers.
This is useful for visually minimalist tables while maintaining accessibility.

attributes.name: sortBy
attributes.description:
The key  of the field currently being used for sorting the table.
Should correspond to one of the `key` values defined in the `fields` array.

attributes.name: sortDesc
attributes.description:
Indicates whether the sorting is in descending order.
When set to `true`, the table will be sorted in descending order; otherwise, it will be in ascending order.

attributes.name: collapseColstart
attributes.description:
The starting column index where the collapsible content should be displayed.
This can create an offset within the table row for the collapsible section.

attributes.name: collapseColspan
attributes.description:
The number of columns the collapsible content should span when expanded.
Determines the width of the collapsible content section.

events.name: change-checked
events.description: Emitted when the status of a header checkbox changes.

events.name: update:sort-by
events.description: Emitted when the sortBy property changes.

events.name: update:sort-desc
events.description: Emitted when the sortDesc property changes.

attributes.name: collapseId
attributes.description:
The unique identifier for the collapsible element. This identifier is used to associate the
collapsible content with its corresponding trigger for accessibility and Bootstrap's collapse functionality.

attributes.name: collapseColspan
attributes.description:
The number of columns the collapsible content should span when expanded.
This controls the width of the collapsible content.

attributes.name: collapseColstart
attributes.description:
The starting position (column index) where the collapsible content should be displayed.
This can be used to create an offset within the row.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description:
Indicates whether the collapsible row content is initially expanded.
When set to true, the collapsible content will be visible by default.

events.name: show
events.description: This event is fired immediately when the show method has been called.

events.name: hide
events.description: This event is fired immediately when the hide method has been called.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: The unique identifier for the input (optional).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The label for the component.

attributes.name: hideLabel
attributes.description: Hides the label.

attributes.name: uploadButtonLabel
attributes.description: The label for the upload button.

attributes.name: uploadButtonTitle
attributes.description:
The title for the upload button.
Defaults to the button label if no title is set.

attributes.name: fileAccept
attributes.description:
Which file formats to accept.
Can be either file extension or mime-type or mixed
e.g. ['.pdf'], ['application/pdf'] or ['.pdf', 'application/pdf']

attributes.name: fileMultiple
attributes.description: Allows selecting multiple files at once.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the component.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description:
Title for the search button.
Defaults to the label if no title is set.

attributes.name: disableUploadButton
attributes.description: Disables the upload button.

attributes.name: hideUploadButton
attributes.description: Displays the component without the upload button.

attributes.name: uploadErrorMessage
attributes.description: Changes the state to error and displays the provided error message.

attributes.name: fileRequired
attributes.description: Required attribute of the input.

events.name: upload
events.description: Emitted when the upload button gets clicked.

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the file selection changes.
